title: Kebab the way it should be.
description: We opened Szef Donald in 2014 with one rule: nothing comes out of a freezer.
imageAlt: Cook turning meat on the grill
paragraph1: Bread is baked through the day. Falafel is rolled by hand every morning. Meat is marinated for eighteen hours before it touches the grill.
paragraph2: We're a small team — three cooks and a counter — and we keep it that way on purpose. Every wrap is made by someone who's been here long enough to care.
paragraph3: Eleven years on, we're still in the same spot on Ściegiennego, still slicing the same way, still arguing over the sauce.
